title: After the St. Lite Kinen: Sixth Sense

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe runs wonderfully at the St. Lite,
and it's all thanks to the prep work we've been
putting in since spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her stamina is improving, her nails are
still worryingly brittle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, with backing from both her friend
and Agnes Tachyon, Manhattan Cafe decides to
run in the Kikuka Sho.
